thread.content: The `<Header />` is `fixed` with `mix-blend-exclusion`, so it visually overlays the video when the video extends to the top of the page. The hero section has `py-24` which adds top padding, pushing th
Changed `py-24` to `pb-24` on the hero section so the video extends to the top of the viewport, allowing the fixed `<Header />` (with `mix-blend-exclusion`) to overlay on top of it.

entries.agentSummary: Changed `py-24` to `pb-24` on the hero section so the video extends to the top of the viewport, allowing the fixed `<Header />` (with `mix-blend-exclusion`) to overlay on top of it.

thread.content: Now I understand the structure. The K-Rides AI Assistant currently uses `images` (renders as `BitStatic`), but the request is to make it like Cortina — a carousel/slider (`BitSlider`). The k-rides fol

Converted the K-Rides AI Assistant entry from `images` (BitStatic) to `slides` (BitSlider), matching the Cortina pattern. It now uses `.webp` as the slide thumbnail and `.jpg` as the lightbox full ima

entries.agentSummary: Converted the K-Rides AI Assistant entry from `images` (BitStatic) to `slides` (BitSlider), matching the Cortina pattern. It now uses `.webp` as the slide thumbnail and `.jpg` as the lightbox full image, and will render with the carousel UI (header with nav buttons, tween scale animation) like Cortina.
